name: Lemon Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zest of 1 lemon and squeeze the juice from 4 1/2 lemons; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, and 1 1/2 cups sugar with a fork until combined. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in the lemon zest.
3. In a separate small bowl, beat the eggs lightly and stir in the milk; then add this egg mixture to the dry ingredients just until the flour is moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased loaf pan. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours.
5. Allow the bread to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
6. In a small saucepan, heat the lemon juice and 2 tablespoons sugar over medium-high heat until boiling. Cook, stirring, until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Brush this syrup evenly over the top of the bread.
7. Serve warm or allow the bread to cool completely before serving later.
